name: Hot and Sour Soup (Opt. Ovo)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Sweet and sour sauce (I use The "Joy of Cooking")
1 teaspoon Hot sauce (a combination of Tobasco and Worcester Sauce, adjusted to taste)
2 tablespoons Barbecue sauce (original recipe called for sliced barbecue pork)
Watercress and Bamboo shoots sliced (if available)
1/4 cup Red and green peppers sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the sweet and sour sauce, water, and egg. Beat until well mixed.
2. Apply heat and gradually add all other ingredients.
3. As the soup approaches a boil, stir in the corn starch mixture to thicken.
4. Continue cooking on low heat until the soup thickens. Do not overcook; serve when vegetables are still crisp.
5. If you're not sweating profusely, it may not be truly hot and sour soup.
